profile.education: Johns Hopkins University (BA); Oxford University (MA, International Relations, Rhodes Scholar)
profile.background: Army combat veteran (Bronze Star recipient), bestselling author, and former CEO of Robin Hood Foundation; became Maryland's first Black governor and 63rd governor in 2023.

profile.education: Swarthmore College (BA Philosophy), Harvard Kennedy School (MPP), Georgetown University Law Center (JD)
profile.background: Former U.S. House member and Maryland state legislator. Former staff attorney at Federal Defenders. Son of a Foreign Service officer, grew up overseas. In Senate since 2017.
profile.office: 730 Hart Senate Office Building

profile.education: Duke University (BA Public Policy), University of Maryland School of Law (JD)
profile.background: Former Prince George's County Executive and State's Attorney. First Black female county executive in Maryland history. Prosecutor focused on domestic violence cases before entering county government.
